name: The Wildlife Rescuers
summary: Melbourne wildlife rescue group responding to wildlife emergencies in and around the city.
description: Relevant for urban wildlife rescue, volunteer training, local incident response and public education.
alignment: Listed because local rescue knowledge helps ground broader welfare and coexistence campaigns.
